text: Almost every part of Starship V3 is different from V2 https://t.co/qglCTs0xXS
summary: Almost every part of Starship V3 is different from V2
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces that Starship V3 represents a major redesign with almost every component changed from V2, indicating rapid iteration and engineering improvements in SpaceX's next-generation rocket. This reflects a core operational principle for hardware-based startups and manufacturers: continuous design optimization and willingness to fundamentally redesign systems to improve performance, manufacturability, or cost—rather than incremental updates.
embed_html:
Almost every part of Starship V3 is different from V2 https://t.co/qglCTs0xXS

text: SpaceX Dragon spaceship docking with the International @Space_Station https://t.co/OQwQ6xdBn8
summary: SpaceX Dragon spaceship docking with the International @Space_Station
ai_summary: Elon Musk shares a SpaceX milestone: Dragon spaceship successfully docking with the International Space Station. This demonstrates SpaceX's operational capability in cargo/crew transport to orbit, a core business function that generates revenue through NASA contracts and commercial spaceflight services, reflecting the company's execution on its mission to reduce launch costs and enable space infrastructure.
embed_html:
SpaceX Dragon spaceship docking with the International @Space_Station https://t.co/OQwQ6xdBn8

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 18, 2026

text: Starship is designed to transport over a megaton of payload to space per year https://t.co/2czUw4uWZA
summary: Starship is designed to transport over a megaton of payload to space per year
ai_summary: Elon Musk states that Starship is engineered to deliver over one megaton of payload annually to space, highlighting SpaceX's capacity scaling objectives. This represents a key engineering and business milestone for SpaceX's reusable rocket program, demonstrating progress toward the company's goal of becoming a high-frequency, high-capacity space transport provider for commercial and government missions.

Starship is designed to transport over a megaton of payload to space per year https://t.co/2czUw4uWZA
